audit_items.proof_trace: AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet() can return NULL on memory allocation failure, but there is no NULL check before dereferencing random_info[0] at line 3804. The proof fails because the required NULL validation is completely absent.
audit_items.attack_scenario: External image processing request triggers memory pressure causing AcquireRandomInfoThreadSet() to return NULL, leading to immediate segmentation fault when GetRandomSecretKey() dereferences random_info[0].
